data.title: Tractor Supply expands pet offerings with VIP Petcare acquisition
data.description: VIP Petcare already operates within 1,700 Tractor Supply locations as it changes hands to its new owner from PetIQ.

data.title: Medline details its Prime vendor model expansion into Canada
data.description: Mowhawk Medbury's nine hospitals will give Medline Canada a chance to apply U.S. learnings as it takes over warehouse and supply chain logistics.

data.title: Costco sees record gas sales in Q3, expects tariff refunds
data.description: Executives shared how the retailer is addressing macroeconomic situations including the cost of oil, gas sales and tariff refunds.

data.title: Dick's Sporting Goods brings sales growth back to Foot Locker in Q1
data.description: Consolidated net sales were up by 62.7% year over year at Dick’s Sporting Goods as it added Foot Locker's business into Q1 earnings results.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Which retailers could lower prices after tariff refunds
data.description: As tens of millions of dollars in tariff refunds arrive, major retailers are addressing possible price changes on their earnings calls and in legal cases.
